name: Anti-GD3 Senescence Immunotherapy
summary: Preclinical immune-checkpoint strategy targeting GD3-positive senescent cells that evade NK-cell immunosurveillance.
mechanism_summary: Targets a ganglioside immune-evasion feature of senescent cells, aiming to restore NK-cell-mediated immunosurveillance or directly remove GD3-positive senescent cells.

open_questions: Whether GD3 is selective enough across human senescent-cell states and tissues
Whether anti-GD3 targeting safely restores clearance rather than disrupting normal ganglioside biology
Which age-related indications are most appropriate for translation
